owner_operator_stated: Site identifies the practice only as 'Full Smile Family Dentist'; no individual owner-dentist name was surfaced (team page 404'd) and no reference anywhere on the site to 'Dental Surgery Services, P.C.' (the NPI record's legal/practice name).
notes: Record name 'DENTAL SURGERY SERVICES, P.C.' does not match the current operator at this exact address+phone (3939 W Fullerton Ave, (773) 235-0000), which brands itself 'Full Smile Family Dentist' (est. 1994 per third-party listings). Vendor hint 'Abrushabove.Net' (A Brush Above Family Dentistry) is confirmed WRONG for this record: that practice is at a different address (3236 W Fullerton Ave) with a different phone ((773) 840-0378) per its own site. No evidence links 'Dental Surgery Services, P.C.' to Full Smile Family Dentist as the same entity (e.g. no 'formerly known as' language), so treated as a possible rebrand/succession, not confirmed continuity.

owner_operator_stated: Page links to 'A Message from Dr. Agarwal', implying Dr. Agarwal is the lead/founding dentist at this location, but no explicit ownership statement was found.
notes: Address (8559 S Pulaski Rd, Chicago, IL 60652) and phone ((773) 582-0035) both match the record exactly on the practice's own Chicago location page. Winterset Dental Care is a small multi-location group (this Chicago office plus a second office in Orland Park, IL) — not a national DSO brand per available evidence. No careers/hiring link found anywhere on the site.

public_practice_name: River North Dental Group (ProCare Dental Group)
owner_operator_stated: Site identifies this location as part of 'ProCare Dental Group', matching the record's legal name 'PROCARE DENTAL GROUP, P.C.'; branded locally as 'River North Dental Group'.
notes: Corroborated exact address+phone match: 'River North Dental Group – 434 W. Ontario Suite 300, Chicago, IL 60610, 312-475-9751' listed on the group's own locations page (record has ZIP 60654 vs site's 60610 for the same street address — a formatting/ZIP variant, not a mismatch). This is a multi-location dental group (10 branded offices across Chicagoland under ProCare Dental Group, P.C.), i.e. a group-practice/DSO-style structure; the employment page lists openings across multiple ProCare locations, not exclusively 434 W Ontario, but is the group's live careers page.

Vendor hint 'Toprankdental.Com' is WRONG/dead for this record: the listing page 301-redirects to https://www.playcardinalcc.com/, an unrelated golf-country-club site with no dental/address content. Searched for an official site for 'Aleck Thomas, DDS' / 'Aleck & Furlan DDS Office' at 10900 S Kedzie Ave, (773) 233-7044; only third-party directory listings were found (Yelp, WebMD, Healthgrades, ADA Find-a-Dentist, docshop, denteldoc, doctorsnetwork) — no practice-owned website could be corroborated by address or phone, so no doctor/hiring facts are reported from those non-authoritative directory pages.

owner_operator_stated: The record's phone number (773) 233-1249 is now registered to a completely different, unrelated practice: Baptist Family Dental / Dr. David B. Baptist, DDS, P.C., at 5850 W. 111th Street, Chicago Ridge, IL 60415 (confirmed on the practice's own contact page). Separately, the record's street address (3838 W 111th St, Chicago, IL 60655) is now occupied by Chris Nikolovski, DDS (dentist-chicago-il.com), Suite 105, phone (773) 801-3996 — also a different dentist/phone than the record. Neither current occupant is 'John Francis McGowan'.
notes: Exact-phone search for "(773) 233-1249" resolves to Baptist Family Dental at a different street address and even a different city (Chicago Ridge, not Chicago) — clear evidence of phone number reassignment/succession, not the named record entity. The record's street address is separately occupied today by an unrelated dentist (Chris Nikolovski, DDS) with yet another phone number. No live website could be corroborated for 'John Francis McGowan' by either address or phone, so this is reported as ownership_conflict rather than no_usable_website.

owner_operator_stated: Gerald G. Gutsell, DDS is identified as the practice's owner/dentist; the practice is legally and publicly named after him ('Gerald G. Gutsell, DDS, Ltd.', abbreviated 'GGGDDS' matching the record's vendor hint and practice_name).
notes: Address matches exactly ('6801 W. Higgins Ave. Chicago, IL 60656', shown in header, footer, and hours sections on the practice's own site) — sufficient corroboration per the Kill Rule even though the site's listed phone, (773) 763-0433, differs from the record's (773) 763-8490. Only one dentist (Dr. Gutsell) is named; five additional staff first names (Lee, Lisa, MaryAnn, Samantha, Vanessa) appear with no titles, so not counted as dentists. No careers/hiring page found. No multi-location/DSO affiliation indicated — appears to be an independent solo practice.
